message:
🐛 Fix WebSocket goroutine leak and reduce DoS body limit (#9714)

- Derive AI chat context from connection-level context so StreamChat
  calls are cancelled immediately when the client disconnects (#9709)
- Reduce global Fiber BodyLimit from 20MB to 5MB to limit memory-based
  DoS surface while preserving feedback screenshot uploads (#9710)

Fixes #9709
Fixes #9710

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
